articles.title: Power & Predictive Dialing
articles.excerpt: Power Dialer A power dialer is a piece of automated telephone technology that dials a phone number right after a call is completed. The power dialer will call the following contact on the list as soon as the caller finishes the previous call. Power dialing makes your team efficient because they don't have to spend time figuring out which number to call next.
